context: Imperative form of 'abrir' (to open) for a polite request using 'você'.

front: Entre, por favor! Fique à vontade.
pronunciation: EHN-tree, poor fah-VOHR! FEE-kee ah voohn-TAH-jee.
back: Come in, please! Make yourself at home.
context: Standard welcoming hospitality commands using 'entrar' and 'ficar'.
Reflexive command using the verb 'sentar-se' (to sit down).

front: Me ajude com isso, por favor.
pronunciation: mee ah-ZHOO-jee koong EES-oo, poor fah-VOHR.
context: Spoken request placing the pronoun 'me' before the command form of 'ajudar'.
Instruction using the imperative form of 'ligar' (to call/phone).
Workplace directive using the command form of 'enviar' (to send).
Irregular imperative form of the verb 'fazer' (to do/make).
Irregular imperative form of 'trazer' (to bring), essential for restaurants.
Irregular imperative form of the verb 'dizer' (to say/tell).
Negative command structure using 'não' followed by the subjunctive/imperative.
Negative command using 'não' with 'falar'.
Instruction using the imperative of 'olhar' (to look).
Command form of 'escutar' (to listen).

back: Turn right at the traffic light.
context: Directional instruction using the command form of 'virar' (to turn).
Directional instruction using the irregular command form of 'seguir' (to follow/go on).
Instruction using the command form of 'subir' (to go up/ascend).

back: Go down to the ground floor.
context: Instruction using the command form of 'descer' (to go down/descend).
Recommendation or directive using 'comprar'.
Health advice statement using the command form of 'beber'.
Dietary advice using the command form of 'comer'.

context: Deadline assignment instruction using 'terminar'.

back: Pay the bill on the app.
